death_date:
18Sub AddTextToColumn()

    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim rng As Range
    Dim cell As Range
    
    Set ws = ActiveSheet
    Set rng = ws.Range("F1:F8501")
    
    For Each cell In rng
        If cell.Value = "Start-UZB-End" Then
            cell.Value = cell.Value
        End If
    Next cell

End Sub00-07-18
